'''hatuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whamola|whamola]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whamola|whamola]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hatuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hætiwith|hætiwith]] || [[word:hætiwij|hætiwij]] || [[word:hætiwish|hætiwish]] || [[word:hætiwi|hætiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatutuwuth|hatutuwuth]] || [[word:hatutuwuj|hatutuwuj]] || [[word:hatutuwush|hatutuwush]] || [[word:hatutuwu|hatutuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatuwuth|hatuwuth]] || [[word:hatuwuj|hatuwuj]] || [[word:hatuwush|hatuwush]] || [[word:hatuwu|hatuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatufwuth|hatufwuth]] || [[word:hatufwuj|hatufwuj]] || [[word:hatufwush|hatufwush]] || [[word:hatufwuf|hatufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hatuwuthu|hatuwuthu]] || [[word:hatuwuju|hatuwuju]] || [[word:hatuwushu|hatuwushu]] || [[word:hatuwuku|hatuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hatuwuth|hatuwuth]] || [[word:hatuwuj|hatuwuj]] || [[word:hatuwush|hatuwush]] || [[word:hatuwu|hatuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hatuwuthul|hatuwuthul]] || [[word:hatuwujul|hatuwujul]] || [[word:hatuwushul|hatuwushul]] || [[word:hatuwukul|hatuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hatuwuthuthu|hatuwuthuthu]] || [[word:hatuwujuju|hatuwujuju]] || [[word:hatuwushushu|hatuwushushu]] || [[word:hatuwuku|hatuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hatuwuthun|hatuwuthun]] || [[word:hatuwujun|hatuwujun]] || [[word:hatuwushun|hatuwushun]] || [[word:hatuwukun|hatuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hatuwuthuoro|hatuwuthuoro]] || [[word:hatuwujuoro|hatuwujuoro]] || [[word:hatuwushuoro|hatuwushuoro]] || [[word:hatuwukuoro|hatuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
